fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-defined identifier for the circuit breaker.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the service node's function.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the component.

fields.name: failureCount
fields.description: The number of times the circuit breaker has failed.

fields.name: threshold
fields.description: Maximum value before triggering an action.

events.name: ServiceNodeLoaded
events.description: Signals successful loading of a service node.

events.name: ServiceNodeLoadFailed
events.description: Indicates a node failed to load, potentially disrupting service.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cooldown (seconds)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Seconds the circuit stays open before transitioning to half-open and probing for recovery.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Failure threshold
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of consecutive failures before the circuit opens and starts rejecting requests.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Fallback behavior
overridableConfigKeys.description: What to return to callers while the circuit is open: reject = fail-fast/strict, cached-response = graceful degrade with stale data, queue = retry-later/no data loss, static-default = safe placeholder.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: open-state response, degraded mode, fail-fast vs graceful degrade

overridableConfigKeys.label: Half-open probe requests
overridableConfigKeys.description: Probe requests allowed through in the half-open state before deciding to close or re-open. Lower = cautious single-probe recovery; higher = aggressive parallel re-validation.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: probe count, recovery test size, probe aggressiveness, recovery test volume, cautious vs fast recovery

overridableConfigKeys.label: Stat display look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for stat / KPI cards.
